steps.title: Substitute the given value for reptiles
steps.content:
We know $r = 12$. Substitute this into the equation $2.5b + 6r = 72$:
$$2.5b + 6(12) = 72$$
$$2.5b + 72 = 72$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of birds
steps.content:
Subtract 72 from both sides to isolate the term with $b$:
$$2.5b = 0$$
Divide both sides by 2.5:
$$b = 0$$
The business can care for 0 birds on this day. That confirms A is correct.
